titleStmt.title: SII 36.296: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 296. (A.R. No. 296 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapādēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged. Grant of certain privileges in the temple to 20 families and their descendants, who were assigned to the temple of Tiruppulippagavar by the tāṉattār, māhēshvaras, kaikkōḷas and kaikkōḷa mudalis in the presence of Kaṇḍiyadēvar, probably an official representative of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavar koyilil śrī māhecuramum tāṉattāru
m kaikkoḷarum tevar kaṇṭiyatevar muṉpāka keṭṭu peṇṭukaḷ makkaḷum puttira puttirarum Eṅkaḷil mutalmai Aṭaivu niṉṟapaṭi Amarakoṉum vēṇāvuṭaiyāṉum pallavaṉ mārāyaṉum Atiyamā
ṉum nantipaṉmaṉum Iyātavarāyaṉum maṉamottakaṇṭa mārāyaṉum muṉaiyataraiyaṉum tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyāṉum Ālālacuntara mārāyaṉum cempiyataraiyaṉum pañcavarrāyaṉum
teṉṉavataraiyaṉum mīṉavataraiyaṉum mālaiiṭṭāṉ kāmatevaṉ coḻakoṉ vattarāyaṉ mu koṉ kkunāyaṉum Ākapper Irupatu Ik koyilil cuta
ntiramum Ūril cutantiramum Ivarkaḷ tiruvolakkattil veṟṟilai peṟavum nilam taṅkāta puttira puttira tevaraṭiyāṟku Oṭukkavum peṇṭukaḷ makkaḷ tānattār Uṇṭupokavum Ippaṭi ca
ntirātittavarai cellakkaṭavutāka cammatittom Ivūr tāṉattārum cimāyecurarum kaikkoḷarum kaikkoḷa mutalikaḷum Ivaṉaivvarom tānattārku māyecurarkum camainta nāṟpatteṇṇāyira veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ūrāṟkku camainta Apimāṉapūcaṇa veḷān Eḻuttu kāṭavataraiyar vaḷavakoṉār Iruṅkoḷar ceramāṉār kaṇṭiyatevar
Digital edition of SII 36.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
